description: Infrastructure monitoring template using the USE (Utilization, Saturation, Errors) methodology. Monitor Kubernetes clusters from nodes to pods with resource metrics, bottleneck detection, and stability tracking. Ready for instant integration with Prometheus or other datasources.

spec.expression: SELECT A.provider AS "Provider", CASE WHEN C.__value__ = 1 THEN 'Healthy' ELSE 'Unhealthy' END AS "Health", ROUND(A.__value__, 0) AS "Total Requests", ROUND(B.__value__, 0) AS "Total Errors", CASE WHEN A.__value__ > 0 THEN ROUND(B.__value__ / A.__value__ * 100, 2) ELSE 0 END AS "Error %" FROM A JOIN B ON A.provider = B.provider JOIN C ON A.provider = C.provider ORDER BY "Error %" DESC LIMIT 100

spec.description: Provider health, total requests, errors and error rate over the selected time range
spec.title: Provider Summary

spec.description: 95th percentile request duration per provider — identifies slow brokers
spec.title: Request latency P95 by provider

spec.description: Active rate limit (requests per second) enforced per provider — shows throttling headroom
spec.title: Rate limiter RPS by provider

spec.description: Trend of live goroutines — spikes indicate goroutine leaks or burst workload
spec.title: Goroutines over time

spec.description: Heap memory breakdown — alloc (live objects), in-use pages, and total reserved from OS
spec.title: Heap memory over time

spec.description: Stop-the-world GC pause distribution — P50/P75/P99 help identify GC pressure
spec.title: GC pause duration

spec.description: Number of live goroutines in the bot-trade process
spec.title: Goroutines (Peak)

spec.description: Real-time request throughput (req/s) per provider — shows live traffic distribution across brokers
spec.title: Total requests by provider

spec.description: Error rate per provider and error type — breakdown helps pinpoint the source of failures (e.g. api, timeout, auth)
spec.title: Total errors by provider & type

spec.description: Current heap memory in use by live objects
spec.title: Heap allocated (Peak)

spec.description: CPU usage as % of the container's allocated limit (0.5 cores). 100% = fully saturating its CPU quota.
spec.title: CPU Usage (% of limit)

spec.description: Memory working set as % of the container's memory limit (~256 MiB). 100% = at the limit — OOM risk.
spec.title: Memory Usage (Peak % of limit)

spec.description: Number of container restarts detected in the selected time range
spec.title: Container Restarts

spec.description: CPU usage over time as % of 0.5-core container limit. Uses max_over_time to capture true peak values without downsampling effect. Values above 100% indicate throttling.
spec.title: CPU Usage Over Time (% of limit)

spec.description: Memory over time vs. the 256 MiB container limit. Working set (active pages) is the key OOM risk indicator.
spec.title: Memory Usage Over Time

spec.description: Network bytes received and transmitted per second by the bot-trade container
spec.title: Network I/O

spec.description: Disk reads and writes in bytes per second by the container filesystem
spec.title: Disk I/O

spec.description: % of CPU scheduler periods where the container was throttled. Uses max_over_time to capture true peak throttle events. >25% indicates CPU limit is constraining the process.
spec.title: CPU Throttle %

spec.description: Rate of network receive/transmit errors and dropped packets for the trading-bot container
spec.title: Network Errors & Drops

title: Bot trade metrics overview
